description: Composition Blue trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two patch pockets at the back with buttoned closures, looped waist, zipper and button closure on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Crafted from soft cotton and designed with a straight Fit that offers a flattering silhouette, this chino from highlander makes for a great addition to your semi-formal wardrobe. Pair it with semi-formal shirts, throw over a blazer and slip into suede shoes. Model statistics Product is of length 44.5” on a model of height 6'1" and waist 31"
